Package com.example

Class ManagerView.IngredientSelection

java.lang.Object
com.example.ManagerView.IngredientSelection
Enclosing class:
ManagerView
private static class ManagerView.IngredientSelection extends Object
Helper class to track ingredient selection and quantity in dialogs.

    private final InventoryItem
    item
    The inventory item being selected.
    private final javafx.scene.control.TextField
    qtyField

    selected
    The checkbox indicating if the item is selected.
